Items.Description:
一旦暂停，breckyunits 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，breckyunits 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，breckyunits 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 breckyunits 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 breckyunits：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 breckyunits 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, breckyunits will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, breckyunits will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by breckyunits will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If breckyunits is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag breckyunits:

breckyunits consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging breckyunits will restore default visibility to their posts.
